ddls:
CREATE TABLE "recipes" (
  "recipe_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recipe */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the recipe */,
  "image_reference" INTEGER /* Reference to the image associated with the recipe */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary description of the recipe */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author who created the recipe */,
  "recipe_category_id" INTEGER /* Category to which the recipe belongs */,
  "preparation_time" INTEGER /* Time required to prepare the recipe */,
  "cooking_time" INTEGER /* Time required to cook the recipe */,
  "total_time" INTEGER /* Total time required for the recipe */,
  "difficulty" TEXT /* Difficulty level of the recipe */,
  "ingredients" TEXT /* List of ingredients required for the recipe */,
  "recipe_instruction" TEXT /* Instructions for preparing the recipe */,
  "number_of_servings" INTEGER /* Number of servings the recipe yields */,
  "slug" TEXT /* URL slug for the recipe */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the recipe was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the recipe was last updated */,
  "published" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the recipe is published */,
  "published_at" TEXT /* Date and time the recipe was published */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recipe_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recipes_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES authors ("author_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recipes_recipe_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("recipe_category_id") REFERENCES recipe_categories ("recipe_category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "authors" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each author */,
  "author_name" TEXT /* Full name of the author */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the author */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biography of the author */,
  "website" TEXT /* Author's website URL */,
  "social_media_links" TEXT /* Author's social media links */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recipe_categories" (
  "recipe_category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recipe category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the recipe category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the recipe category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recipe_category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recipe_images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "recipe_id" INTEGER /* ID of the recipe associated with the image */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the image */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the image was uploaded */,
  "caption" TEXT /* Image caption */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recipe_images_recipe_id FOREIGN KEY ("recipe_id") REFERENCES recipes ("recipe_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recipe_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recipe_tag_mapping" (
  "recipe_id" INTEGER /* ID of the recipe */,
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recipe_id", "tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recipe_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "recipe_id" INTEGER /* ID of the recipe being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who submitted the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment left by the user */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was submitted */,
  "helpful_votes" INTEGER /* Number of helpful votes received */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recipe_reviews_recipe_id FOREIGN KEY ("recipe_id") REFERENCES recipes ("recipe_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recipe_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., guest, member, admin) */,
  "account_status" TEXT /* Status of the user's account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recipe_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "recipe_id" INTEGER /* ID of the recipe being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the recipe */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the recipe was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, save, print) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recipe_access_recipe_id FOREIGN KEY ("recipe_id") REFERENCES recipes ("recipe_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recipe_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recipe_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recipe version */,
  "recipe_id" INTEGER /* ID of the recipe */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the recipe */,
  "change_log" TEXT /* Log of changes made in this version */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recipe_versions_recipe_id FOREIGN KEY ("recipe_id") REFERENCES recipes ("recipe_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recipe_ingredients" (
  "ingredient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ingredient entry */,
  "recipe_id" INTEGER /* ID of the recipe */,
  "ingredient_name" TEXT /* Name of the ingredient */,
  "quantity" REAL /* Quantity of the ingredient */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measure for the ingredient */,
  "ingredient_group" TEXT /* Group to which the ingredient belongs (e.g., spices, produce) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ingredient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recipe_ingredients_recipe_id FOREIGN KEY ("recipe_id") REFERENCES recipes ("recipe_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recipe_instructions" (
  "instruction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instruction step */,
  "recipe_id" INTEGER /* ID of the recipe */,
  "step_number" INTEGER /* Step number in the sequence of instructions */,
  "instruction_text" TEXT /* Text describing the instruction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instruction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recipe_instructions_recipe_id FOREIGN KEY ("recipe_id") REFERENCES recipes ("recipe_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recipe_preparation_steps" (
  "preparation_step_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each preparation step */,
  "recipe_id" INTEGER /* ID of the recipe */,
  "step_number" INTEGER /* Step number in the sequence of preparation steps */,
  "step_description" TEXT /* Description of the preparation step */,
  "preparation_time" INTEGER /* Time required to complete the preparation step */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("preparation_step_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recipe_preparation_steps_recipe_id FOREIGN KEY ("recipe_id") REFERENCES recipes ("recipe_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recipe_cooking_steps" (
  "cooking_step_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cooking step */,
  "recipe_id" INTEGER /* ID of the recipe */,
  "step_number" INTEGER /* Step number in the sequence of cooking steps */,
  "step_description" TEXT /* Description of the cooking step */,
  "cooking_time" INTEGER /* Time required to complete the cooking step */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cooking_step_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recipe_cooking_steps_recipe_id FOREIGN KEY ("recipe_id") REFERENCES recipes ("recipe_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recipe_nutrition" (
  "nutrition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each nutrition entry */,
  "recipe_id" INTEGER /* ID of the recipe */,
  "calories" REAL /* Calories per serving */,
  "protein" REAL /* Protein per serving */,
  "fat" REAL /* Fat per serving */,
  "carbohydrates" REAL /* Carbohydrates per serving */,
  "fiber" REAL /* Fiber per serving */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("nutrition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recipe_nutrition_recipe_id FOREIGN KEY ("recipe_id") REFERENCES recipes ("recipe_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recipe_dietary_tags" (
  "dietary_tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dietary tag entry */,
  "recipe_id" INTEGER /* ID of the recipe */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the dietary tag (e.g., vegan, gluten-free) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dietary_tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recipe_dietary_tags_recipe_id FOREIGN KEY ("recipe_id") REFERENCES recipes ("recipe_id")
)
